name: GOLFTEC Madison
about: GOLFTEC is a high-tech golf instruction and club fitting facility that uses data-driven methods to help golfers improve their game. The company employs over 100 PGA Award Winning Coaches and utilizes advanced technologies like OPTIMOTION motion measurement, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide personalized feedback. Lessons are structured around a Swing Evaluation that creates a custom game plan, with additional sessions for club fitting, short game work, and on-course playing lessons as skills progress. While the specific Madison location page was not found, the general brand offering focuses on indoor training bays for lessons and practice, complemented by expert coaching services.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using launch monitors and OPTIMOTION technology for precise swing analysis
Personalized lesson plans based on a foundational Swing Evaluation for structured improvement
Expert PGA coaches providing feedback and strategic guidance for long-term progress
